flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Iowa Western Community College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5k → 2.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Iowa Western Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).
